name: bamboo-hr
description: Reads and writes BambooHR employee, metadata, reporting, time off, applicant tracking, benefits, goals, training, time tracking, scheduling, and webhook resources that are available through the documented Basic-auth API surface.

risk.read: external BambooHR API reads across HR, applicant tracking, benefits, payroll-adjacent, time off, training, goals, and metadata resources
risk.write: creates, updates, assigns, approves, or deletes BambooHR HR records according to the selected reverse-ETL action
risk.approval: reverse ETL writes require plan preview and approval token
